tasks.title: T001 Document canonical status sources for Workbench clients
tasks.description: Document where the frontend reads spec, plan, and task status.

plans.title: Generated Projects
plans.description: Emit complete status-aware SDD trees in generated apps.

tasks.description: Write a SAT-like tree file for generated foundation specs.

tasks.description: Write concrete plan and task files referenced by the generated tree.

tasks.title: T005 Compute generated metadata task totals from the shared task source
tasks.description: Keep metadata counts aligned with the generated tree.

plans.title: Validation
plans.description: Cover the normalization contract with regression tests.

tasks.title: T006 Add regression tests for generated SDD status consistency
tasks.description: Assert generated metadata, tree statuses, and task files stay aligned.
